compiled_state.title: [dso-setup next-steps]: prints '3. See INSTALL.md for full documentation' with bare filename -> INSTALL.md is in the plugin repo, not copied into the scaffolded project, leaving users with no way to find it
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
dso-setup.sh line 493 prints '3. See INSTALL.md for full documentation'. The bare filename misleads users — INSTALL.md lives in the plugin repo root (github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/blob/main/INSTALL.md), never in the scaffolded project. Users have no way to find it from the message alone.

## Expected
Full URL, or explicit reference to the plugin repo location.

## Fix
Replace with: 'See https://github.com/navapbc/digital-service-orchestra/blob/main/INSTALL.md for full documentation'
